project_type: React + TypeScript board game with Express/WebSocket server
build_system: Vite for client, tsx for server
verification_instructions: Run tsc -b to verify TypeScript compiles. Run vite build to verify bundling succeeds.
environment_constraints: Node.js available. No test framework installed. Verification is TypeScript compilation.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode with noUnusedLocals and noUnusedParameters. tsconfig.app.json excludes src/server. tsconfig.node.json covers server.
key_patterns: Zustand store (src/store/gameStore.ts), pure game logic functions in src/utils/gameLogic.ts, types in src/types/game.ts, React components in src/components/. State is immutable - functions return new state. Server mirrors game logic calls over WebSocket.
directory_structure: src/types/ - TypeScript interfaces and game data constants. src/utils/ - Pure game logic functions. src/store/ - Zustand state management. src/components/ - React UI. src/server/ - Express + WebSocket multiplayer server.
